home.description: Manage your expenses, visualize spending trends, monitor monthly reports, and analyze category spending with modern dashboards.

expenseTracking.title: Expense Tracking
expenseTracking.description: Add, edit and organize expenses with categories.

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticsDashboard.description: Beautiful charts and reports powered by Recharts.

secureAuth.title: Secure JWT Auth
secureAuth.description: Firebase authentication with secure JWT backend.

login.title: Login
login.googleOnly: This email is registered with Google. Please use Continue with Google.
login.backendSessionFailed: Google authentication succeeded, but the app could not start your session. Please try again.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.backendUnavailable: Account created. Please login after starting backend.
signup.googleLinked: This email is already linked with Google. Please use Continue with Google.
signup.existingAccount: An account with this email already exists. Please login.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

errors.emailAlreadyInUse: An account with this email already exists. Please login instead.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.weakPassword: Password should be at least 6 characters.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.operationNotAllowed: Email/password signup is not enabled in Firebase Authentication.
errors.invalidCredential: Invalid email or password. If you created this account with Google, use Continue with Google.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
errors.popupBlocked: Google sign-in popup was blocked. Please allow popups and try again.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized in Firebase Authentication.
errors.googleNetwork: Network error during Google sign-in. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Quick summary of your spending activity

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Analytics and insights from your expense history
